steps.title: Find the constant
steps.content:
Use the cord with circumference $0.75$ inches and strength $697.5$ pounds:
$$
697.5=800a(0.75)^2
$$
Since $(0.75)^2=0.5625$, this becomes
$$
697.5=450a
$$
so $a=1.55$.

steps.title: Use the new circumference
steps.content: For a circumference of $4.50$ inches, substitute into the model: $y=800(1.55)(4.50)^2=1{,}240(20.25)=25{,}110$. The answer is 25110.
